# kCGImagePropertyNamedColorSpace

**Global Variable**

The name of the image’s color space.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyNamedColorSpace: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString].

## Image Properties

- **kCGImagePropertyHEICSCanvasPixelHeight**: The height of the main image, in pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyHEICSCanvasPixelWidth**: The width of the main image, in pixels.

items.description: The height of the main image, in pixels.
